ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 守护进程（连接时部署辅助程序）

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The remote server is asking for additional authentication. Enter the response for each prompt below.
ast.target: 远程服务器要求额外身份验证。请在下方每个提示处输入响应。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Another edit landed on the remote since you last read
ast.target: 自您上次读取以来，远程端已有新的编辑落地。

ast.name: error
ast.target: anchorNode 和/或 focusNode 为空

ast.name: info
ast.target: ServerDeployer: 正在启动守护进程

ast.name: info
ast.source: ResourceBridge: thumbnail fast path enabled (daemon supports fs.thumbnail)
ast.target: ResourceBridge: 缩略图快速路径已启用（守护进程支持 fs.thumbnail）

ast.name: info
ast.source: ResourceBridge: range fast path enabled (daemon supports fs.readBinaryRange)
ast.target: ResourceBridge: 范围读取快速路径已启用（守护进程支持 fs.readBinaryRange）

ast.name: info
ast.target: RemoteTerminalView: 远程 shell 已退出 (eof)

ast.name: info
ast.target: handlePendingPluginSuggestions: 用户选择了“稍后询问”

ast.name: info
ast.source: handlePendingPluginSuggestions: user picked skip — clearing snapshot
ast.target: handlePendingPluginSuggestions: 用户选择了跳过 — 正在清除快照

ast.name: info
ast.source: ensureDaemonBinary: user declined daemon download; staying on SFTP
ast.target: ensureDaemonBinary: 用户拒绝下载守护进程；继续使用 SFTP

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pre-fill fields from `~/.ssh/config` (HostName, User, Port, IdentityFile, ProxyJump).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your private key, e.g. `~/.ssh/id_ed25519`.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path on the SSH server, e.g. `/home/user/vault`, or home-relative `work/vault`.
ast.target: SSH 服务器上的绝对路径，例如 `/home/user/vault`，或相对于主目录的路径 `work/vault`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One directory name per line. Any directory with this exact name is skipped anywhere in the tree — never transferred or indexed. Essential when the remote path is a large work dir (node_modules / .git etc. would otherwise make it unusable).
ast.target: 每行一个目录名。任何具有此确切名称的目录在树中的任何位置都会被跳过 — 永远不会被传输或索引。当远程路径是大型工作目录时，此设置至关重要（否则 node_modules / .git 等目录会使系统无法使用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default: `.obsidian-remote/server.sock` (home-relative is fine). Daemon mode only.
ast.target: 默认值：`.obsidian-remote/server.sock`（可以使用相对于主目录的路径）。仅限守护进程模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 默认：`.obsidian-remote/token`（相对于主目录）。仅限守护进程模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of times to retry the connection with exponential backoff before giving up. Set to 0 to disable auto-reconnect.
ast.target: 放弃前，使用指数退避重试连接的次数。设为 0 可禁用自动重连。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the remote shell. Leave blank to use the remote user's login shell ($SHELL). Example: "/usr/bin/zsh -l".
ast.target: 覆盖远程 shell。留空则使用远程用户的登录 shell ($SHELL)。示例：\"/usr/bin/zsh -l\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lines kept in the terminal's in-memory buffer. Bigger = more memory; not persisted across re-opens.
ast.target: 终端内存缓冲区中保留的行数。越大占用内存越多；重新打开时不会保留。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Locally count error categories and reconnect-state outcomes. Stays on disk under the plugin folder; nothing is sent over the network. Useful for pasting a counter snapshot into a bug report.
ast.target: 在本地统计错误类别和重连状态结果。数据保存在插件文件夹下的磁盘上；不会通过网络发送。便于将计数器快照粘贴到错误报告中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In-memory deltas since the last flush.
ast.target: 自上次刷新以来的内存增量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, the source vault's per-plugin settings are seeded into the shadow vault for each installed plugin. Off by default — installed plugins start with their out-of-the-box defaults.
ast.target: 开启后，源仓库的每个插件设置会被复制到影子仓库中对应的已安装插件。默认关闭——已安装插件会使用其出厂默认设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hostname or IP of the remote machine.
ast.target: 远程机器的主机名或 IP。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to read (or create) the SSH private key.
ast.target: 读取（或创建）SSH 私钥的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates a fresh keypair at the path above and shows the public key so you can paste it into the remote's ~/.ssh/authorized_keys.
ast.target: 在上述路径创建一个新的密钥对，并显示公钥，以便您可以将其粘贴到远程的 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys 文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path on the remote, or `~/relative` (home-relative).
ast.target: 远程上的绝对路径，或 `~/相对路径`（相对于主目录）。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 意外断开后的重连尝试次数

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 守护进程日志（最近 50 行）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Also copy each plugin's settings (data.json) from source
ast.target: 同时从源复制每个插件的设置 (data.json)

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 生成新的 ed25519 密钥

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add this key to the remote host
ast.target: 将此密钥添加到远程主机

ast.name: warn
ast.source: startReconnect: no active profile to reconnect with
ast.target: startReconnect: 没有活动的配置文件可供重连

ast.name: warn
ast.source: AdapterManager.patch: no active remote base path
ast.target: AdapterManager.patch: 没有活动的远程基础路径

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Opening link blocked as opener could not be cleared
ast.target: 由于无法清除 opener，打开链接被阻止

ast.name: warn
ast.source: snapshotted emitter LIKELY used public and SHOULD HAVE BEEN created with DisposableStore. snapshotted here
ast.target: 快照发射器可能被公开使用，且本应使用 DisposableStore 创建。此处已快照

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [LEAKING LISTENERS] GC'ed these listeners that were NOT yet disposed:
ast.target: [泄漏的监听器] GC 了这些尚未被释放的监听器：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Memoize should only be used in functions with zero parameters
ast.target: Memoize 应仅用于零参数函数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: writeSync is unreliable and will be removed soon.
ast.target: writeSync 不可靠，即将被移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: installMissingShadowPlugins: vault is not FileSystemAdapter-backed; skipping
ast.target: installMissingShadowPlugins: 仓库未基于 FileSystemAdapter；跳过

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyPluginConfigsForInstalled: vault is not FileSystemAdapter-backed; skipping
ast.target: copyPluginConfigsForInstalled: 仓库未基于 FileSystemAdapter；跳过

ast.name: warn
ast.source: vault.adapter is not FileSystemAdapter; file sink disabled
ast.target: vault.adapter 不是 FileSystemAdapter；文件接收器已禁用

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ensureDaemonBinary: unsupported remote os/arch; staying on SFTP
ast.target: ensureDaemonBinary: 不支持的远程操作系统/架构；继续使用 SFTP

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: failed to clear the offline queue (see console.log)
ast.target: 远程 SSH：清除离线队列失败（请查看 console.log）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Fill in host and username first
ast.target: 请先填写主机和用户名

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 配置文件名称为必填项

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 远程仓库路径为必填项

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 远程 SSH：遥测数据已刷新

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: in-memory telemetry counters cleared
ast.target: 远程 SSH：内存中的遥测计数器已清除

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 远程 SSH：守护进程已重启

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Private key path must be absolute
ast.target: 私钥路径必须是绝对路径

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 远程 SSH：连接丢失 — 正在重连…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: already connected. Disconnect first.
ast.target: 远程 SSH：已连接。请先断开连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: daemon unavailable — connected via SFTP (reduced features).
ast.target: 远程 SSH：守护进程不可用 — 通过 SFTP 连接（功能受限）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: adapter patch failed — disconnecting
ast.target: 远程 SSH：适配器补丁失败 — 正在断开连接

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: no available workspace leaf to open the terminal in
ast.target: 远程 SSH：没有可用的工作区叶子来打开终端

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: 0 files found on the remote. Check the profile’s remotePath actually points at the vault (see console.log).
ast.target: 远程 SSH：在远程上找到 0 个文件。请检查配置文件的 remotePath 是否确实指向仓库（请查看 console.log）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: vault is not file-system-backed; cannot locate plugin source
ast.target: 远程 SSH：仓库未基于文件系统；无法定位插件源

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: the remote vault is still opening — give it a moment
ast.target: 远程 SSH：远程仓库仍在打开中 — 请稍候

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 远程 SSH：适配器已打过补丁

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: adapter patch failed (see console.log)
ast.target: 远程 SSH：适配器补丁失败（请查看 console.log）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: adapter is not patched
ast.target: 远程 SSH：适配器未打补丁

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 远程 SSH：适配器已恢复

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: connect first (the tunnel rides on SFTP)
ast.target: 远程 SSH：请先连接（隧道通过 SFTP 传输）

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 远程 SSH：无活动配置文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: daemon binary not staged. Run `npm run build:server` (or `build:full`) and reload the plugin.
ast.target: 远程 SSH：守护进程二进制文件未暂存。请运行 `npm run build:server`（或 `build:full`）并重新加载插件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Remote SSH: no profiles configured. Open settings to add one.
ast.target: 远程 SSH：未配置任何配置文件。请打开设置以添加一个。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Check the profile's key path / passphrase / agent socket. The remote may also have rejected the user; try `ssh -v <user>@<host>` to confirm.
ast.target: 请检查配置文件的密钥路径/密码短语/代理套接字。远程主机也可能拒绝了该用户；请尝试 `ssh -v <user>@<host>` 进行确认。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote didn't respond in time. Check whether the host is reachable (ping / `ssh -v`) and whether a corporate firewall is throttling SSH.
ast.target: 远程主机未及时响应。请检查主机是否可达（ping / `ssh -v`）以及企业防火墙是否在限制 SSH。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote daemon rejected the SSH handshake. Possible causes: stale daemon process, mismatched protocol version, or a misconfigured sshd.
ast.target: 远程守护进程拒绝了 SSH 握手。可能原因：守护进程进程过期、协议版本不匹配或 sshd 配置错误。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote's host key doesn't match what we have on file. Reconnect to see the host-key change dialog and decide whether to trust the new key; if the change is unexpected, the host may have been swapped (or the connection intercepted).
ast.target: 远程主机的主机密钥与我们记录的不匹配。重新连接以查看主机密钥更改对话框并决定是否信任新密钥；如果更改出乎意料，主机可能已被替换（或连接被拦截）。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Open the plugin's log file (`<vault>/<configDir>/plugins/remote-ssh/console.log`) for the full stack — the JSONL line for this error carries the original message + any structured context.
ast.target: 请打开插件的日志文件（`<vault>/<configDir>/plugins/remote-ssh/console.log`）以查看完整堆栈 — 此错误的 JSONL 行包含原始消息和任何结构化上下文。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The daemon's session token wasn't accepted. The token file on the remote may have rotated; reconnect to redeploy the daemon and refresh the token.
ast.target: 守护进程的会话令牌未被接受。远程主机上的令牌文件可能已轮换；请重新连接以重新部署守护进程并刷新令牌。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Token mismatch with the daemon. The daemon may be from an older deploy; reconnect to redeploy a fresh binary + token.
ast.target: 与守护进程的令牌不匹配。守护进程可能来自较旧的部署；请重新连接以重新部署新的二进制文件和令牌。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The path doesn't exist on the remote vault. If you expected it to be there, check the profile's remotePath and that the file wasn't deleted out-of-band.
ast.target: 远程保险库中不存在该路径。如果您预期它存在，请检查配置文件的 remotePath 以及文件是否未被外部删除。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote path is a file when a directory was expected (or vice versa). This usually means the local view drifted from the remote tree — try reconnecting.
ast.target: 远程路径是一个文件，但预期是一个目录（或反之亦然）。这通常意味着本地视图与远程树不同步 — 请尝试重新连接。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote already has a file at this path; the daemon refused to overwrite. Pick a different name or remove the existing file first.
ast.target: 远程主机在此路径已有一个文件；守护进程拒绝覆盖。请选择其他名称或先删除现有文件。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The daemon can't read or write this path under the SSH user's permissions. `chmod` / `chown` the path, or pick a remote vault root the user owns.
ast.target: 守护进程无法在 SSH 用户的权限下读取或写入此路径。请对路径执行 `chmod` / `chown`，或选择用户拥有的远程保险库根目录。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The plugin tried to read or write a path the daemon refuses to expose. This is a guardrail — usually means a misconfigured profile remotePath or a path-traversal attempt.
ast.target: 插件尝试读取或写入守护进程拒绝暴露的路径。这是一个保护措施 — 通常意味着配置文件的 remotePath 配置错误或存在路径遍历尝试。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Another writer changed the file after you opened it. Reload the file to see the remote version, then merge your edits and save again.
ast.target: 您打开文件后，另一个写入者更改了该文件。请重新加载文件以查看远程版本，然后合并您的编辑并再次保存。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote daemon predates this plugin version. Reconnect to redeploy the bundled daemon binary, or update the daemon by hand.
ast.target: 远程守护进程版本早于此插件版本。请重新连接以重新部署捆绑的守护进程二进制文件，或手动更新守护进程。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The plugin sent a malformed call. This is a plugin bug; the JSONL log line carries the method + params for filing an issue.
ast.target: 插件发送了格式错误的调用。这是一个插件错误；JSONL 日志行包含用于提交问题的方法和参数。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The daemon hit an unexpected condition. Check the daemon's log on the remote (`~/.obsidian-remote/server.log`) — the JSONL log line on the plugin side carries the call that triggered it.
ast.target: 守护进程遇到了意外情况。请检查远程主机上的守护进程日志（`~/.obsidian-remote/server.log`）— 插件端的 JSONL 日志行包含触发此问题的调用。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Daemon returned an error code outside the known taxonomy. Worth reporting; the JSONL log line carries the raw code + message.
ast.target: 守护进程返回了已知分类之外的错误代码。值得报告；JSONL 日志行包含原始代码和消息。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: DNS couldn't resolve the remote's host. Check the profile's `host` field and `nslookup <host>` from the same machine.
ast.target: DNS 无法解析远程主机的主机名。请检查配置文件的 `host` 字段，并在同一台机器上运行 `nslookup <host>`。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote answered but refused the connection. The SSH daemon may not be running, or it's on a different port — check the profile's `port`.
ast.target: 远程主机有响应但拒绝了连接。SSH 守护进程可能未运行，或使用了不同的端口 — 请检查配置文件的 `port`。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote closed the SSH session unexpectedly. Often a sshd crash, an upstream load-balancer timeout, or a network blip.
ast.target: 远程主机意外关闭了 SSH 会话。通常是 sshd 崩溃、上游负载均衡器超时或网络抖动所致。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The remote isn't reachable from this machine right now. Check VPN / Wi-Fi / firewall / `ping <host>`.
ast.target: 当前无法从此机器访问远程主机。请检查 VPN / Wi-Fi / 防火墙 / `ping <host>`。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: The plugin couldn't read a local file (likely a private key or socket). Check filesystem permissions on the profile's `privateKeyPath` / `agentSocket`.
ast.target: 插件无法读取本地文件（可能是私钥或套接字）。请检查配置文件的 `privateKeyPath` / `agentSocket` 的文件系统权限。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 在重新连接期间调用了 replayQueuedOp

ast.name: name
ast.target: 断开与远程保险库的连接

ast.name: name
ast.target: 取消正在进行的重新连接

ast.name: name
ast.source: Debug: patch app.vault.adapter onto SFTP (read-side only)
ast.target: 调试：将 app.vault.adapter 打补丁到 SFTP（仅读取端）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Debug: restore app.vault.adapter to its original
ast.target: 调试：将 app.vault.adapter 恢复为原始状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Debug: list vault root via current adapter
ast.target: 调试：通过当前适配器列出保险库根目录

ast.name: name
ast.target: 调试：测试守护进程隧道

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重新连接到远程主机（影子保险库自动连接）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 设置第一个远程保险库

ast.name: text
ast.target: 信任新密钥并重新连接

ast.name: text
ast.source: The file changed on the remote while you were editing. Compare the panes below and pick how to resolve the conflict.
ast.target: 您在编辑时，远程文件已更改。请比较下方窗格并选择如何解决冲突。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 未配置 SSH 配置文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: SFTP (default) talks SFTP directly. RPC auto-deploys obsidian-remote-server on connect and routes filesystem operations through it — requires the server binary to have been staged via `npm run build:server`.
ast.target: SFTP（默认）直接使用 SFTP。RPC 在连接时自动部署 obsidian-remote-server，并通过它路由文件系统操作 — 要求服务器二进制文件已通过 `npm run build:server` 暂存。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connecting to a profile opens the remote vault in a new Obsidian window — a "shadow vault" specific to that profile. The current vault stays untouched.
ast.target: 连接到配置文件会在新的 Obsidian 窗口中打开远程保险库 — 一个特定于该配置文件的“影子保险库”。当前保险库保持不变。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In-memory deltas since the last flush. Safe to paste into a bug report.
ast.target: 自上次刷新以来的内存增量。可安全粘贴到错误报告中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Install plugins from your source vault?
ast.target: 从您的源保险库安装插件吗？

ast.name: text
ast.target: 跳过 — 不安装任何内容

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set up your first remote vault
ast.target: 设置您的第一个远程保险库

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connect to a remote machine over SSH and edit its vault from this Obsidian window. You can change everything later in settings.
ast.target: 通过 SSH 连接到远程机器，并从此 Obsidian 窗口编辑其保险库。您稍后可以在设置中更改所有内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Append the public key below to the remote's ~/.ssh/authorized_keys. You may need to mkdir + chmod 700 ~/.ssh first.
ast.target: 将下面的公钥附加到远程主机的 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys。您可能需要先执行 mkdir + chmod 700 ~/.ssh。

ast.name: title
ast.source: File not found on the remote
ast.target: 远程服务器上未找到文件

ast.name: title
ast.target: 远程服务器权限被拒绝

ast.name: title
ast.source: Path is outside the vault root
ast.target: 路径位于保险库根目录之外

ast.name: title
ast.target: 写入冲突 — 文件已在远程更改

ast.name: title
ast.target: 守护进程协议版本过旧

ast.name: title
ast.target: 连接被远程服务器拒绝

ast.name: title
ast.target: 连接被远程服务器重置
